contracts.name: csv_has_observables
contracts.diagnostic_hint: ADPLL checker-visible clock and control signals must be saved.

contracts.name: reference_clock_edges_present
contracts.diagnostic_hint: Reference clock stimulus is present; preserve the harness if this passes.

contracts.name: feedback_clock_edges_present
contracts.diagnostic_hint: Feedback oscillator is not producing enough edges.

contracts.name: control_voltage_activity
contracts.diagnostic_hint: Loop control voltage is stuck; repair loop update or monitor drive.
